active_planning_focus: Add persistent planning session state for ni-start continuity.
last_planning_summary: Session state is being added as a non-authoritative planning aid so future model sessions can resume from explicit state instead of hidden chat history.

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
notes.locked_docs: Session state must not override locked docs.
notes.completion: Session state must not mark docs complete.
notes.raw_transcript: Raw transcript is not the source of truth.
